title: Excalibur | Xaero's World Map Support
description: Retexture of Xaero's World Map in Excalibur style
body:
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53bd9ada751157c5b2f5d749e2caa1176956530f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xaeros-world-map-excalibur-support) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71bb7f4433bdaf0acd433da49e7610cc9b8c59d.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-xaeros-world-map-support) ---
An **unofficial compatibility pack** designed to align the textures of [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) mod with the incredible [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack. This pack is **100% completed**, including: - Redesign of all GUI buttons. - Removal of top-right-corner NESW. - Support for [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims). **Note:** - Require [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) to function. - For the best experience, use this pack alongside [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal). - For Feedback / Bug Report / Suggestion, please DM me on my **Discord (@thedatthai)**. **Credits:** - [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/DTcBuGJU) - Creator of Excalibur - [thexaero](https://modrinth.com/user/ANNqL3WC) - Creator of Xaero's World Map - [GrandPappyJay](https://modrinth.com/user/zutNI5E3) - Texture shading of waypoints and pointers in [Clarent Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clarent) - [TeeCee](https://modrinth.com/user/TeeCee) - Inspiration for thumbnail ## Showcase:
![Showcase (Textures)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2665ff1848ed4eb505a12de00ec792b7760a8d2a.png) ![Showcase (In-Game)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06a843654e1ee87a07f780644bebd04dd8e69945.jpeg)
